summary: Comic Studio Enhanced Features Testing - All backend APIs (31 tests) and frontend UI elements working correctly. Fixed admin route auth check and creditAPI.getBalance call.

image_upload_no_constructor_error.description: Page loads without 'Image is not a constructor' error - Image import renamed to ImageIcon from lucide-react

six_style_options.description: All 6 style options available with sparkle indicator on new OpenCV filters
six_style_options.evidence: Comic Color, Comic B&W, Manga B&W, Cartoon Shader ✨, Pencil Sketch ✨, Pop Art ✨

custom_sfx_input.description: Custom SFX input field present in panel editor with data-testid='custom-sfx-input'
custom_sfx_input.note: Appears when panel is selected after image processing

export_zip_button.description: Export ZIP button available with data-testid='export-zip-btn'

share_comic_button.description: Share Comic button available with data-testid='share-comic-btn'

backend_genres_api.description: GET /api/comic/genres returns 8 genres (superhero, romance, comedy, scifi, fantasy, mystery, horror, kids)

backend_assets_api.description: GET /api/comic/assets/{genre} returns stickers, frames, bubbles, sfx for each genre

admin_genres_api.description: GET /api/comic/admin/genres requires admin role and returns full genre config

admin_templates_api.description: Admin template CRUD operations working correctly

genre_selection_ui.description: All 8 genres displayed with emoji icons and clickable

credits_display.description: Credits display now working correctly after fix (was calling wrong API method)

story_mode_toggle.description: Story mode toggle works, shows character name input when ON, adds +1 credit

export_cost_calculation.description: Export cost displays correctly - 8 credits base (4 panels), 10 for 6+ panels, +1 story mode, +2 watermark removal

privacy_notice.description: Privacy First notice displayed - images processed client-side

bugs_fixed.issue: Admin routes returning 403 for admin user
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed user.get('isAdmin') to user.get('role').upper() in ['ADMIN', 'SUPERADMIN'] check

bugs_fixed.issue: creditAPI.getCredits is not a function error
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed creditAPI.getCredits() to creditAPI.getBalance() which is the correct method name

critical_code_review_comments: OpenCV.js integration adds advanced filters (cartoon, sketch) but falls back to Canvas if loading fails
Client-side image processing ensures user privacy
JSZip used for multi-page comic export
Share functionality uses native Web Share API when available

success_rate.backend: 100% (31/31 tests passed - 19 existing + 12 new admin tests)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo and admin users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comic Studio enhanced features fully tested. All 6 style options (including 3 new OpenCV filters) working. Admin CMS routes require role='ADMIN' not isAdmin field. Export ZIP and Share Comic buttons appear after processing images. creditAPI uses getBalance() not getCredits().
